About: It is about the first man and woman according to the creation myth of the Abrahamic religions.
It is about the doctrines of the fall of man and original sin.
It is about two creation narratives in the Book of Genesis.
It is about the infiltration of evil into the world.
It is about the first murder.
It is about the creation of humankind in God's image.
It is about the creation of the first man from dust and his placement in the Garden of Eden.
It is about the creation of the first woman from Adam's rib.
It is about the temptation by a serpent and the eating of forbidden fruit.
It is about the consequences of disobeying God and banishment from the Garden of Eden.

About: それはアブラハムの宗教の創造神話における最初の男性と女性についてです。
それは人間の堕落と原罪の教義についてです。
